description: Conduct a literature search for the topic 'Circadian Rhythm' using the National Institutes of Health (NIH) PubMed database (https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/) to prepare a journal club reading packet. Download three distinct 'Free full text' or 'PubMed Central' articles and rename each PDF using the format 'FirstAuthor_Year.pdf' based on the article's metadata. Save the three renamed PDFs to a folder at ~/Documents/JournalClub/.
